attacking_style: Launches long-range attacks 15-100km from finish on high mountain stages, often too early to sustain but effective for destabilizing rivals. Prefers steady tempo climbing over explosive accelerations; typically attacks on shallow gradients in final kilometers rather than steepest pitches.
team_tactics: Chronically exposed by poor team support in critical moments—left isolated on steepest sections, no teammates nearby during mechanicals, and forced into domestique roles that suppress GC ambitions. Works best when given freedom for solo attacks rather than team-protected defensive racing.
terrain_preference: Excels on accumulative climbing days with multiple ascents and long-range efforts (100km+ breakaways). Struggles on steep explosive gradients where pure accelerations required. Shallow summit finishes and tempo-based climbs suit him better than punchy, variable-pace attacks.
vulnerability: Vulnerable to mechanicals due to poor team positioning, collapses in extreme heat, and frequently drops on steepest gradients when rivals change pace. Tends to overestimate form—'eyes bigger than stomach'—leading to unsustainable attacks. ITT weaknesses (86th Tour de Suisse) limit podium consolidation.
key_patterns: Peaks late in Grand Tours: form improves week three, securing podiums/near-wins final stages (Giro 2019)
Long-range solo attacks 15-100km out gain 1-3 minutes but fade final kilometers when isolated
Repeatedly isolated on steepest climbs when teammates dropped early, exposing team support gaps
Forced into domestique roles despite superior climbing (paced Froome 2017 Tour despite looking stronger)
Mechanical failures at critical GC moments coincide with poor team positioning around him
Third-tier status behind top GC duos confirmed: cannot follow explosive pace changes
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 showed inability to challenge top-tier GC riders (third-tier behind Jumbo trio Vuelta), form collapses in heat (UAE Tour), and continued isolation problems despite age 33 tactical maturity
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 13
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 17
